visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black Kathmandu beanie and a light blue scarf smiles broadly at the camera in a selfie-style shot. Behind her is a blurred background of a building and trees. (2) The scene cuts to a vintage steam train with dark maroon and beige carriages stationed at a wooden platform, surrounded by tall eucalyptus trees. (3) The woman is now seated on the edge of the train carriage, dangling her feet and waving to the camera as the train begins to move. (4) Close-up shots of a koala sleeping on a tree branch, followed by kangaroos in a dirt enclosure at a wildlife park. (5) A plate of seared meat served with mashed potatoes, gravy, and broccoli is shown in an indoor restaurant setting. (6) Another koala is seen perched on a high branch, and then two brown tree kangaroos are shown climbing on ropes and a small wooden structure. (7) A train conductor in a blue uniform and cap walks along a train platform as people hold up smartphones to record. (8) Shots of people's legs dangling from the moving train carriages as it traverses a high, curved wooden trestle bridge over a road with red and white cars. (9) The woman on the train wincing with her eyes shut tight and holding onto the metal railing as the train chugs along. (10) The woman speaks directly to the camera on the train, touching her eye and pointing to the surrounding forest while describing her experience.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 要搭火車啦~~~ (2) [Subtitle]: 澳洲 🇦🇺 [Logo]: 一日動物園+小火車. (3) [Subtitle]: 這次到墨爾本最期待的行程. (4) [Subtitle]: 我要去搭小火車!! (5) [Subtitle]: 這次報了一日行程. (6) [Subtitle]: 一早先去野生動物保護區. (7) [Subtitle]: 太冷了牠在睡覺. (8) [Variety]: Z. (9) [Subtitle]: 尼也想睡了? 我也好冷... (10) [Subtitle]: 常看到有人說在澳洲到處都看得到袋鼠. (11) [Subtitle]: 真的沒有. (12) [Subtitle]: 我只看到這個 跟這個. (13) [Variety]: (這也是袋鼠肉). (14) [Variety]: 觀眾表示心靈受創... (15) [Subtitle]: 還是來看可愛的無尾熊好ㄌ. (16) [Subtitle]: 無尾熊也超Q. (17) [Variety]: 逆砍砍這個腿庫!! (18) [Subtitle]: 好想捏捏. (19) [Subtitle]: 還有第一次看到樹袋鼠. (20) [Variety]: 緊握扶手~站穩樹枝~ (21) [Subtitle]: 好滑. (22) [Subtitle]: 接著出太陽終於要去搭小火車!! (23) [Subtitle]: 推薦大家坐靠近月台的方向. (24) [Subtitle]: 拍照起來最有fu. (25) [Subtitle]: 還遇到當站務員的台灣人. (26) [Subtitle]: 其中有一段會腳底懸空! (27) [Subtitle]: 這位已經嚇爛. (28) [Subtitle]: 怎麼這麼高夭壽. (29) [Subtitle]: 結果最經典最漂亮的那段都沒有睜開眼睛... (30) [Subtitle]: 還好有相機記錄下來. (31) [Subtitle]: 大家來這裡的時候眼睛要小心. (32) [Subtitle]: 因為他會噴氣. (33) [Subtitle]: 會有煤炭的灰跑進眼睛!! (34) [Subtitle]: 但整體搭起來很有趣. (35) [Subtitle]: 火車速度不會到太快. (36) [Subtitle]: 也有欄杆可以扶著. (37) [Subtitle]: 路上的人還會跟你揮手~~ (38) [Subtitle]: 有種叢林冒險感. (39) [Subtitle]: 推推值得來體驗~

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, approximately 6 passengers on the train, and 5 people on the platform including staff.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a black Kathmandu beanie, a light blue fuzzy scarf, and a grey sweatshirt with a graphic print.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a sunny train station platform with wooden buildings, a lush green forest seen from a moving train, and an indoor restaurant setting with warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat acoustic guitar and light percussion music starts as a cheerful female narrator introduces her trip to Melbourne. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks a transition to the zoo scenes. (3) The rhythmic sound of the steam train's engine and a sharp whistle blast occur simultaneously with the music. (4) Background crowd noise including laughter and excited screaming rises as the train crosses the wooden bridge. (5) The narrator's tone shifts to a more personal and cautionary style while explaining the soot in her eyes, though the upbeat music remains at a lower volume underneath.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a personal travel experience and provide a mini-guide for tourists visiting Melbourne, Australia. It highlights the Puffing Billy steam train and a wildlife park, offering tips on where to sit and a warning about coal ash while riding the train.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy editing style typical of social media vlogs, with vibrant colors and expressive subtitles to convey excitement and engagement.
